name: Smiths Group plc
description: Smiths Group plc is a British multinational engineering business headquartered in London, United Kingdom. It operates through four main divisions: John Crane, which provides mechanical seals and support systems; Smiths Detection, a provider of sensors and threat detection equipment; Flex-Tek, which manufactures engineered components for heating and moving fluids; and Smiths Interconnect, which designs electronic components and sub-systems. The company serves customers in the energy, security, aerospace, defense, and industrial markets globally.
